blocker: No real on-call SRE was contacted and no response data exists; human access (recruitment, consent, scheduling, ethics) is outside an autonomous agent's reach. Delivered a runnable, machine-validated feedback protocol instead of collected data. Lower-validity fallback (public post-mortems as proxy for cascade/trap realism only) documented.
one_line: Built a machine-validated SRE feedback protocol (5 falsifiable thesis claims; 12-min war-story-first elicit-then-reveal survey + 45-min interview guide; recruitment plan with named on-call channels, screener, consent, N=25-40/8-12; analysis template with flag-based claim verdicts + Cohen's kappa); validate_instruments.py runs green (caught+fixed 2 real bugs); human data-collection blocked and documented honestly.
